Title: Limit system access to authorized users
Description: Limit information system access to authorized users processes acting on behalf of authorized users or devices

Title: Limit system access to authorized functions
Description: Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute

Title: Control CUI flow
Description: Control the flow of CUI in accordance with approved authorizations

Title: Separate duties of individuals
Description: Separate the duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion

Title: Employ least privilege
Description: Employ the principle of least privilege including for specific security functions and privileged accounts

Title: Use non-privileged accounts
Description: Use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing nonsecurity functions

Title: Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions
Description: Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs

Title: Limit unsuccessful logon attempts
Description: Limit unsuccessful logon attempts

Title: Provide privacy and security notices
Description: Provide privacy and security notices consistent with applicable CUI rules

Title: Use session lock
Description: Use session lock with pattern-hiding displays to prevent access and viewing of data after period of inactivity

Title: Terminate sessions
Description: Terminate (automatically) a user session after a defined condition

Title: Monitor and control remote access
Description: Monitor and control remote access sessions

Title: Employ cryptographic mechanisms for remote access
Description: Employ cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of remote access sessions

Title: Route remote access via managed access control points
Description: Route remote access via managed access control points

Title: Authorize remote execution
Description: Authorize remote execution of privileged commands and remote access to security-relevant information

Title: Authorize wireless access
Description: Authorize wireless access prior to allowing such connections

Title: Protect wireless access
Description: Protect wireless access using authentication and encryption

Title: Control connection of mobile devices
Description: Control connection of mobile devices

Title: Encrypt CUI on mobile devices
Description: Encrypt CUI on mobile devices and mobile computing platforms

Title: Verify and control connections to external systems
Description: Verify and control/limit connections to and use of external information systems

Title: Limit use of portable storage
Description: Limit use of organizational portable storage devices on external information systems

Title: Control CUI posted publicly
Description: Control information posted or processed on publicly accessible information systems

Title: Provide security awareness training
Description: Ensure that managers system administrators and users of organizational information systems are made aware of the security risks

Title: Train for recognizing and reporting threats
Description: Ensure that organizational personnel are adequately trained to carry out their assigned information security-related duties

Title: Provide insider threat awareness training
Description: Provide security awareness training on recognizing and reporting potential indicators of insider threat

Title: Create system audit records
Description: Create protect and retain information system audit records to enable monitoring analysis investigation and reporting

Title: Ensure actions are traceable
Description: Ensure that the actions of individual information system users can be uniquely traced to those users

Title: Review and update audited events
Description: Review and update audited events

Title: Alert on audit process failure
Description: Alert in the event of an audit process failure

Title: Correlate audit review and reporting
Description: Correlate audit review analysis and reporting processes for investigation and response

Title: Provide audit reduction and report generation
Description: Provide audit reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis and reporting

Title: Provide system time stamps
Description: Provide a system capability that compares and synchronizes internal system clocks

Title: Protect audit information
Description: Protect audit information and audit tools from unauthorized access modification and deletion

Title: Limit audit log management
Description: Limit management of audit functionality to a subset of privileged users

Title: Establish configuration baselines
Description: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational information systems

Title: Establish security configuration settings
Description: Establish and enforce security configuration settings for information technology products

Title: Track and manage changes
Description: Track review approve/disapprove and audit changes to information systems

Title: Analyze security impact of changes
Description: Analyze the security impact of changes prior to implementation

Title: Define and enforce access restrictions for change
Description: Define document approve and enforce physical and logical access restrictions associated with changes

Title: Employ least functionality
Description: Employ the principle of least functionality by configuring information systems to provide only essential capabilities

Title: Restrict nonessential functionality
Description: Restrict disable and prevent the use of nonessential programs functions ports protocols and services

Title: Apply deny-by-exception policy
Description: Apply deny-by-exception (blacklist) policy to prevent the use of unauthorized software

Title: Control user-installed software
Description: Control and monitor user-installed software

Title: Identify system users
Description: Identify information system users processes acting on behalf of users or devices

Title: Authenticate users
Description: Authenticate (or verify) the identities of those users processes or devices as a prerequisite to allowing access

Title: Use multifactor authentication
Description: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts

Title: Employ replay-resistant authentication
Description: Employ replay-resistant authentication mechanisms for network access to privileged and non-privileged accounts

Title: Prevent identifier reuse
Description: Prevent reuse of identifiers for a defined period

Title: Disable identifiers after inactivity
Description: Disable identifiers after a defined period of inactivity

Title: Enforce minimum password complexity
Description: Enforce a minimum password complexity and change of characters when new passwords are created

Title: Prohibit password reuse
Description: Prohibit password reuse for a specified number of generations

Title: Allow temporary passwords
Description: Allow temporary password use for system logons with an immediate change to a permanent password

Title: Store and transmit passwords securely
Description: Store and transmit only cryptographically-protected passwords

Title: Obscure feedback of authentication information
Description: Obscure feedback of authentication information

Title: Establish incident handling capability
Description: Establish an operational incident-handling capability for organizational information systems

Title: Track and report incidents
Description: Track document and report incidents to appropriate officials

Title: Test incident response capability
Description: Test the organizational incident response capability

Title: Perform system maintenance
Description: Perform maintenance on organizational information systems

Title: Control system maintenance tools
Description: Provide effective controls on the tools techniques mechanisms and personnel used to conduct system maintenance

Title: Ensure off-site equipment sanitized
Description: Ensure equipment removed for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI

Title: Check media for malicious code
Description: Check media containing diagnostic and test programs for malicious code before use

Title: Require multifactor auth for remote maintenance
Description: Require multifactor authentication to establish nonlocal maintenance sessions and terminate when complete

Title: Supervise maintenance activities
Description: Supervise the maintenance activities of maintenance personnel without required access authorization

Title: Protect system media
Description: Protect (i.e. physically control and securely store) information system media containing CUI

Title: Limit access to CUI on system media
Description: Limit access to CUI on information system media to authorized users

Title: Sanitize or destroy media before disposal
Description: Sanitize or destroy information system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse

Title: Mark media with CUI markings
Description: Mark media with necessary CUI markings and distribution limitations

Title: Control access to media during transport
Description: Control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability during transport outside of controlled areas

Title: Implement cryptographic mechanisms during transport
Description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of CUI stored on digital media during transport

Title: Control removable media
Description: Control the use of removable media on information system components

Title: Prohibit portable storage without owner
Description: Prohibit the use of portable storage devices when such devices have no identifiable owner

Title: Protect backup CUI
Description: Protect the confidentiality of backup CUI at storage locations

Title: Screen individuals
Description: Screen individuals prior to authorizing access to information systems containing CUI

Title: Protect CUI during personnel actions
Description: Ensure that CUI and information systems containing CUI are protected during and after personnel actions such as terminations and transfers

Title: Limit physical access
Description: Limit physical access to organizational information systems equipment and the respective operating environments to authorized individuals

Title: Protect physical facility
Description: Protect and monitor the physical facility and support infrastructure for those information systems

Title: Escort visitors
Description: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity

Title: Maintain audit logs of physical access
Description: Maintain audit logs of physical access

Title: Control physical access devices
Description: Control and manage physical access devices

Title: Enforce safeguarding at alternate work sites
Description: Enforce safeguarding measures for CUI at alternate work sites

Title: Periodically assess risk
Description: Periodically assess the risk to organizational operations and assets individuals and other organizations

Title: Scan for vulnerabilities
Description: Scan for vulnerabilities in organizational information systems and applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities are identified

Title: Remediate vulnerabilities
Description: Remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with assessments of risk

Title: Assess security controls
Description: Periodically assess the security controls in organizational information systems to determine if controls are effective

Title: Develop and implement plans of action
Description: Develop and implement plans of action designed to correct deficiencies and reduce or eliminate vulnerabilities

Title: Monitor security controls continuously
Description: Monitor information system security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure continued effectiveness

Title: Develop system security plans
Description: Develop implement and maintain system security plans that describe boundaries environments of operation and how requirements are implemented

Title: Monitor communications at boundaries
Description: Monitor control and protect organizational communications at external boundaries and key internal boundaries

Title: Employ architectural designs
Description: Employ architectural designs software development techniques and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security

Title: Separate user from management functionality
Description: Separate user functionality from information system management functionality

Title: Prevent unauthorized transfer
Description: Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources

Title: Implement subnetworks
Description: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated

Title: Deny network traffic by default
Description: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow by exception

Title: Prevent remote devices from split tunneling
Description: Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections and connections to external networks

Title: Implement cryptographic mechanisms
Description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission

Title: Terminate network connections
Description: Terminate network connections associated with communications sessions at the end of the sessions or after defined period of inactivity

Title: Establish and manage cryptographic keys
Description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational information systems

Title: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography
Description: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI

Title: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative devices
Description: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of devices in use to users

Title: Control and monitor mobile code
Description: Control and monitor the use of mobile code

Title: Control and monitor VoIP
Description: Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies

Title: Protect authenticity of communications
Description: Protect the authenticity of communications sessions

Title: Protect CUI at rest
Description: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest

Title: Identify and manage flaws
Description: Identify report and correct information and information system flaws in a timely manner

Title: Provide protection from malicious code
Description: Provide protection from malicious code at appropriate locations within organizational information systems

Title: Monitor security alerts
Description: Monitor information system security alerts and advisories and take appropriate actions

Title: Update malicious code protection
Description: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available

Title: Perform periodic scans
Description: Perform periodic scans of the information system and real-time scans of files from external sources as files are downloaded opened or executed

Title: Monitor system communications for attacks
Description: Monitor organizational information systems including inbound and outbound communications traffic to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks

Title: Identify unauthorized use
Description: Identify unauthorized use of organizational information systems
